vehicleComplianceOverdue.title: 🚨 {{registrationNumber}}: Compliance Overdue
vehicleComplianceOverdue.body: Vehicle has expired compliance. Service immediately.

financeRecordCreated.title: New Financial Record Added
financeRecordCreated.body: A new financial record was added for {{entityName}}: {{transactionType}}{{amountSuffix}}

financeRecordUpdated.title: Financial Record Updated
financeRecordUpdated.body: A financial record was updated for {{entityName}}.

financeRecordDeleted.title: Financial Record Deleted
financeRecordDeleted.body: A financial record was deleted for {{entityName}}.

financeRecordDeducted.title: Record Marked for Deduction
financeRecordDeducted.body: A financial record for {{entityName}} has been marked as deducted{{amountSuffix}}.

financeRecordFullyDeducted.title: Record Fully Deducted
financeRecordFullyDeducted.body: A financial record for {{entityName}} has been fully deducted ({{currency}} {{amount}}).

financeHighBalance.title: High Balance Alert
financeHighBalance.body: Outstanding balance for {{entityName}} has reached {{amount}} EUR (threshold: {{threshold}} EUR).
